channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cultural Activities Linked to Slower Biological Aging in Older Adults
item.description: A study published in the Journal of Epidemiology and Community Health suggests that regular participation in cultural activities like visiting museums, attending theaters, and going to cinemas may be ...

item.title: Collaboration between NIDA, RITA, and Airtel to address ID document shortages and improve mobile access
item.description: Ubungo District Commissioner Albert Msando called for collaboration between government agencies and telecom providers to solve the problem of citizens lacking proper ID documents for SIM card registra...

item.title: EDF Halts Nuclear Reactors Again Due to Heatwave, Plans Upgrades
item.description: Electricité de France (EDF), the primary electricity provider in France, has announced it will temporarily halt operations at two nuclear reactors—Bugey 3 on the Rhône and Golfech 2 on the Garonne—due...

item.title: Kano Police Successfully Intercept Bandit Carrying 109 Rounds of Live Ammunition
item.description: The Kano State Police Command has successfully arrested a suspected bandit in Bichi Local Government Area, recovering an AK-47 magazine, 109 rounds of live ammunition, and other items allegedly meant ...

item.title: Elliot Lake Arena to Reopen in September After Three-Year Closure
item.description: The Elliot Lake arena, which has been closed for three years due to structural issues and safety concerns, is set to reopen in September 2026. This development comes after extensive repairs and safety...

item.title: Trump's Global Impact: Shifting Alliances and Energy Transition
item.description: The article compiles letters to the editor discussing Donald Trump's influence on global politics and economics. One contributor argues that Trump's policies have forced NATO allies to increase defens...

item.title: Federal Court to Hear Motion to Temporarily Block Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger
item.description: A federal court has scheduled a hearing for July 16, 2026, to address an emergency motion filed by 12 state attorneys general seeking to temporarily halt Paramount's proposed merger with Warner Bros. ...

item.title: DCP Youth Leader Rashid Mangala Killed in Mob Attack During Alleged M-Pesa Theft Attempt
item.description: The article reports on the tragic death of Rashid Mangala, a prominent youth leader for the Democracy for Citizens Party (DCP) in Kakamega County. Mangala was stoned to death by a mob in Mundere, Buny...

item.title: Legal proceedings initiated against Fazl over controversial remarks on security personnel
item.description: A Lahore sessions court has issued a notice to the National Cyber Crime Investigation Agency (NCCIA) regarding a petition seeking the registration of a case against JUI-F chief Maulana Fazlur Rehman f...

item.title: Albanese unveils national AI strategy as debate grows over job protections and technology regulation
item.description: This edition of News Worthy focuses on the Federal Government’s newly announced artificial intelligence strategy, with political reporter Caitlyn Rintoul examining both its ambitions and its shortcomi...

item.title: Madlanga Commission to Hear Testimony from Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry into allegations of impropriety in law enforcement continues its proceedings, with corruption-accused Vusimusi ‘Cat’ Matlala set to testify. The hearing, which is pa...

item.title: Pilipinas Today's Political Ad Campaigns and the Rise of Pink Slime Journalism
item.description: Rappler's investigation reveals how Pilipinas Today, a digital news operation, masquerades as a legitimate newsroom while secretly acting as a political propaganda machine. From August 2020 to April 2...

item.title: Senate to Address Duterte's Bank and Tax Records in Impeachment Trial
item.description: The Senate impeachment trial of former President Rodrigo Duterte is set to address a key procedural step involving the disclosure of his personal bank accounts and tax records. The court will delibera...

item.title: Plateau State Launches Community-Driven Initiative to Reduce Out-of-School Children Rate
item.description: The Plateau State Government is taking urgent steps to address the growing number of children not in school, with a target of reducing the 23.2% out-of-school rate through community action. The govern...

item.title: Four friends killed in gang attack in Mkhuhlu, Mpumalanga
item.description: On July 15, 2026, a gang ambush in Mkhuhlu, Mpumalanga, left four friends dead and one injured. Alice Mahlangu, 19, and her friends Fanafana Ngobe, Remember Sedibe, and Xolani Mona were shot while at ...

item.title: Trump Condemns ICE Policy Shift on Traffic Stops Following Fatal Shootings
item.description: President Donald Trump expressed panic and demanded the reversal of a policy change by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) following two fatal shootings involving ICE agents during traffic stops...

item.title: India-UK Economic and Social Security Agreements Enter into Force
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Wednesday celebrated the formal implementation of the India-United Kingdom Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA) and the landmark Social Security Agreement,...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Urges FBR to Support Business Community for Economic Growth
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has directed the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) to prioritize resolving issues faced by the business community, emphasizing their role as the backbone of Pakistan's econo...

item.title: Defense Team Argues Against Subpoenaing Sara Duterte's Financial Records in Impeachment Trial
item.description: The defense team of Vice President Sara Duterte has urged the Senate impeachment court to dismiss the House prosecution panel's request for subpoenas related to her bank and tax records. During the si...
